# Netscape HTTP Cookie File
# https://curl.se/docs/http-cookies.html
# This file was generated by Get cookies.txt LOCALLY extension
#
# ATTENTION: This is a placeholder file!
# Replace this file with real cookies from your TikTok session.
#
# How to get real cookies:
# 1. Install "Get cookies.txt LOCALLY" extension in Chrome
# 2. Go to https://www.tiktok.com and login
# 3. Click extension icon -> Export
# 4. Save as cookies/tiktok.txt
#
# Example format (your real cookies will look different):
.tiktok.com	TRUE	/	TRUE	1817154681	sessionid	YOUR_SESSION_ID_HERE
.tiktok.com	TRUE	/	TRUE	1817154681	csrf_token	YOUR_CSRF_TOKEN_HERE
.tiktok.com	TRUE	/	TRUE	1790370684	tt_webid	YOUR_WEBID_HERE
.tiktok.com	TRUE	/	TRUE	1814130684passport_csrf_token	YOUR_CSRF_HERE
